# diffgrab
> Web page change tracking with structured diffs -- markgrab + snapgrab, MCP native.
## Install
```
pip install diffgrab          # core (markgrab + httpx)
pip install diffgrab[cli|mcp|visual|all]
```
Requires: Python >= 3.11. Core deps: markgrab >= 0.1.2, httpx >= 0.28.
## Module-Level Functions (`diffgrab`)
Async convenience wrappers -- create DiffTracker, run one op, close. All accept `*, db_path: str = ""`.
### `async track(url, interval_hours=24, *, db_path="") -> str`
Register URL for tracking, take initial snapshot via markgrab.
### `async check(url=None, *, db_path="") -> list[DiffResult]`
Check one (`url=str`) or all (`url=None`) tracked URLs for changes.
### `async diff(url, before_id=None, after_id=None, *, db_path="") -> DiffResult`
Structured diff between two snapshots. `None` IDs = two most recent.
### `async history(url, count=10, *, db_path="") -> list[dict]`
Snapshot metadata (keys: `id`, `url`, `content_hash`, `title`, `word_count`, `captured_at`). Newest first.
### `async untrack(url, *, db_path="") -> str`
Remove URL from tracking + delete all snapshots.
## DiffTracker (`diffgrab.tracker`)
`DiffTracker(db_path="~/.local/share/diffgrab/diffgrab.db")` -- main orchestrator.
| Method | Returns | Notes |
|--------|---------|-------|
| `async track(url, interval_hours=24)` | `str` | Returns "Already tracking: {url}" if exists |
| `async check(url=None)` | `list[DiffResult]` | SHA-256 hash comparison, stores new snapshot on change |
| `async diff(url, before_id=None, after_id=None)` | `DiffResult` | None IDs = two most recent |
| `async history(url, count=10)` | `list[dict]` | Same keys as module-level history |
| `async untrack(url)` | `str` | Deletes all snapshots for URL |
| `async close()` | `None` | Release SQLite file lock |
## DiffResult (`diffgrab.differ`)
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| `url` | `str` | required |
| `changed` | `bool` | required |
| `added_lines` / `removed_lines` | `int` | `0` |
| `changed_sections` | `list[str]` | `[]` -- markdown heading names |
| `unified_diff` | `str` | `""` |
| `summary` | `str` | `""` -- e.g. "12 lines added, 3 removed in sections: News, FAQ." |
| `before_snapshot_id` / `after_snapshot_id` | `int | None` | `None` |
| `before_timestamp` / `after_timestamp` | `str` | `""` |
## compute_diff (`diffgrab.differ`)
`compute_diff(before_text, after_text, url="", before_snapshot_id=None, after_snapshot_id=None, before_timestamp="", after_timestamp="") -> DiffResult`
Direct text-to-text diff using `difflib.unified_diff`. Section analysis splits by ATX headings.
## Database (`diffgrab.db`)
`Database(db_path="~/.local/share/diffgrab/diffgrab.db")` -- SQLite, WAL mode, foreign keys. Lazy init.
| Method | Returns |
|--------|---------|
| `add_tracked_url(url, interval_hours=24)` | `int` (row ID) |
| `get_tracked_url(url)` | `dict | None` (keys: id, url, interval_hours, created_at, last_checked_at) |
| `get_all_tracked_urls()` | `list[dict]` |
| `update_last_checked(url)` | `None` |
| `remove_tracked_url(url)` | `bool` |
| `add_snapshot(url, content_hash, markdown, title="", word_count=0)` | `int` (row ID) |
| `get_latest_snapshot(url)` | `dict | None` (keys: id, url, content_hash, markdown, title, word_count, captured_at) |
| `get_snapshot_by_id(snapshot_id)` | `dict | None` |
| `get_snapshots(url, count=10)` | `list[dict]` (newest first) |
| `get_snapshot_pair(url)` | `tuple[dict | None, dict | None]` (older, newer) |
| `close()` | `None` |
## Visual Diff (`diffgrab.visual`)
Requires `diffgrab[visual]` (snapgrab). Pillow optional for pixel comparison.
### VisualDiffResult
| Field | Type | Default |
|-------|------|---------|
| `url` | `str` | required |
| `changed` | `bool` | required |
| `before_path` / `after_path` / `diff_path` | `str` | `""` |
| `pixel_change_ratio` | `float` | `0.0` (0.0-1.0) |
| `error` | `str` | `""` |
### Functions
`is_available() -> bool` -- check if snapgrab installed.
`async capture_screenshot(url, output_dir="/tmp/diffgrab") -> str` -- full-page screenshot path.
`compute_pixel_diff(before_path, after_path, output_path="") -> tuple[bool, float, str]` -- (changed, ratio, diff_path). Threshold: 0.1% pixels.
`async visual_diff(url, before_path=None, after_path=None, output_dir="/tmp/diffgrab") -> VisualDiffResult` -- end-to-end visual comparison.
## MCP Server (`diffgrab.mcp_server`)
Entry point: `diffgrab-mcp` (stdio). 5 tools:
| Tool | Params | Returns |
|------|--------|---------|
| `track_url` | `url: str, interval_hours: int = 24` | status string |
| `check_changes` | `url: str | None = None` | JSON array |
| `get_diff` | `url: str, before_id: int? = None, after_id: int? = None` | JSON (unified_diff truncated 2000 chars) |
| `get_history` | `url: str, count: int = 10` | JSON array |
| `untrack_url` | `url: str` | status string |
Config: `{"mcpServers": {"diffgrab": {"command": "diffgrab-mcp", "transport": "stdio"}}}` or `uvx --from diffgrab[mcp] diffgrab-mcp`.
## CLI (`diffgrab[cli]`)
| Command | Key Options |
|---------|-------------|
| `diffgrab track <url>` | `--interval INT` (default 24), `--db PATH` |
| `diffgrab check [url]` | `--db PATH` |
| `diffgrab diff <url>` | `--before INT`, `--after INT`, `--db PATH` |
| `diffgrab history <url>` | `--count INT` (default 10), `--db PATH` |
| `diffgrab untrack <url>` | `--db PATH` |
## Examples
### Track and check
```python
from diffgrab import track, check
await track("https://news.ycombinator.com", interval_hours=6)
results = await check()
for r in results:
    if r.changed:
        print(f"+{r.added_lines}/-{r.removed_lines} in {r.changed_sections}")
```
### DiffTracker with custom DB
```python
from diffgrab import DiffTracker
tracker = DiffTracker(db_path="/tmp/my.db")
await tracker.track("https://example.com/status", interval_hours=1)
changes = await tracker.check()
d = await tracker.diff("https://example.com/status")
await tracker.close()
```
### Direct text diff
```python
from diffgrab.differ import compute_diff
r = compute_diff("# A\nold\n", "# A\nnew\n", url="x")
print(r.changed, r.added_lines, r.changed_sections)  # True 1 ['A']
```
## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/diffgrab) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/diffgrab/)
